title: The Pitt
overview: The staff of Pittsburgh's Trauma Medical Center work around the clock to save lives in an overcrowded and underfunded emergency department.

translations.overview: The staff of Pittsburgh's Trauma Medical Center work around the clock to save lives in an overcrowded and underfunded emergency department.
El personal del Centro Médico de Traumatismo de Pittsburgh trabaja para salvar vidas en un servicio de urgencias saturado y sin fondos suficientes.

translations.title: 더 피트
translations.overview: 피츠버그 외상 센터의 의사 로비는 새 인턴과 의대생을 맞이한다. 인턴들은 레지던트와 간호사들 틈에서 응급실의 현실에 눈을 뜬다. 한편, 로비는 비용 삭감에 눈먼 경영진과 대립하는데...

translations.title: Питт
translations.overview: Повседневная жизнь медицинских работников в Питтсбургской больнице, когда онисталкиваются с личными кризисами, политикой на рабочем месте и эмоциональными нагрузками, связанными с лечением тяжелобольных пациентов, демонстрирует стойкость, необходимую для их благородного призвания.
A equipe do Centro Médico de Emergência de Pittsburgh trabalha para salvar vidas em um departamento de emergência superlotado e carente de recursos.

translations.title: The Pitt
translations.overview: The Pitt ofrece una visión realista de los retos a los que se enfrenta el personal sanitario en los Estados Unidos de hoy, visto a través de la lente de los héroes de primera línea que trabajan en un hospital de la actualidad en Pittsburgh, Pensilvania.

translations.title: Urgent
translations.overview: Personál pittsburského traumatologického centra pracuje nepřetržitě, aby zachránil životy na přeplněném a podfinancovaném pohotovostním oddělení.
Dans l'Amérique d'aujourd'hui, les professionnels de la santé sont confrontés à de nombreux défis au sein d'un hôpital de Pittsburgh, en Pennsylvanie.

Een realistisch onderzoek van de uitdagingen waarmee gezondheidswerkers in het hedendaagse Amerika worden geconfronteerd, gezien door de lens van de frontliniehelden die in een modern ziekenhuis in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania werken.

translations.title: Pittsburška bolnišnica
translations.overview: Osebje travmatološkega medicinskega centra v Pittsburghu 24 ur na dan rešuje življenja na prenatrpanem in obubožanem oddelku za nujno pomoč.

translations.title: Vészhelyzet Pittsburghben
translations.overview: A pittsburghi Trauma Medical Centerben éjjel-nappal azon dolgoznak, hogy életeket mentsenek a túlzsúfolt és alulfinanszírozott sürgősségi osztályon.
Personel Centrum Medycyny Traumatycznej w Pittsburghu pracuje całą dobę, aby ratować ludzkie życie na przepełnionym oddziale ratunkowym.

translations.title: Pitsburška bolnica
translations.overview: Osoblje Medicinskog centra za traumu u Pittsburghu radi danonoćno kako bi spasilo živote u prenapučenom i nedovoljno financiranom odjelu hitne pomoći.

translations.title: The Pitt: Spitalul
translations.overview: Angajații de la centrul medical din Pittsburgh lucrează nonstop să salveze vieți într-o secție de urgențe supraaglomerată și cu prea puțini angajați.

translations.title: Спешни случаи в Питсбърг
translations.overview: Персоналът на Травматологичния медицински център в Питсбърг работи денонощно, за да спасява животи в пренаселено и недофинансирано спешно отделение.

translations.title: Питсбуршка хитна служба
translations.overview: Особље Ургентног центра у Питсбургу даноноћно спасава животе у претрпаној болници с недовољним финансијама.
Het personeel van het Trauma Medisch Centrum van Pittsburgh werkt 24/7 om levens te redden op een overvolle en ondergefinancierde afdeling SEH.

translations.title: Интензивна нега: Питсбург
translations.overview: Персоналот на Медицинскиот трауматолошки центар во Питсбург работат непрестајно спасувајќи животи во пренатрупаниот оддел за интензивна нега.
O Centro Médico de Traumatologia de Pittsburgh trabalha 24 horas por dia para salvar vidas num serviço de urgências sobrelotado e com poucos fundos.

translations.title: Urgent
translations.overview: Zamestnanci pittsburského Trauma Medical Center pracujú nepretržite, aby zachránili životy na preplnenej a nedostatočne financovanej pohotovosti.
De ansatte på Pittsburghs Trauma Medical Center jobber døgnet rundt for å redde liv på en overfylt avdeling med dårlig økonomi.
Personalet på Pittsburghs Trauma Medical Center arbejder døgnet rundt for at redde liv på en overfyldt og underfinansieret akutafdeling.
Pittsburghin traumaosasto työskentelee kellon ympäri pelastaakseen henkiä sairaalassa, jossa potilaita on liikaa ja varoja on liian vähän.
Personalen på Trauma Medical Center i Pittsburgh jobbar dygnet runt för att rädda liv på en överbelagd och underfinansierad akutavdelning.

translations.title: เดอะ พิตต์: นรกอีอาร์
translations.overview: การปฏิบัติการสุดสมจริงของบุคลากรทางการแพทย์ผู้เผชิญความท้าทายในอเมริกายุคปัจจุบัน

translations.title: 匹兹堡医护前线
translations.overview: 讲述匹兹堡一家医院的医护人员日常应对个人危机、职场政治和危重病人的情志护理等情况，检视当今美国医疗工作者所面临的挑战，揭示他们肩负崇高使命所需的韧性。

translations.title: 匹茲堡醫魂
translations.overview: 本劇透過賓夕法尼亞州匹茲堡現代醫院中第一線英雄的視角，檢視當今美國醫療工作者所面臨的挑戰。

translations.title: Пітт
translations.overview: Співробітники травматологічного медичного центру Піттсбурга працюють цілодобово, рятуючи життя в переповненому і недофінансованому відділенні невідкладної допомоги.

translations.title: Pitsburgo ligoninė
translations.overview: Kasdienis sveikatos priežiūros specialistų gyvenimas Pitsburgo ligoninėje, kur jie derina asmenines problemas, darbo vietos politiką ir emocinę įtampą gydant kritiškai sergančius pacientus, atskleidžiant jų kilniam pašaukimui reikalingą atsparumą.

translations.title: ザ・ピット / ピッツバーグ救急医療室
translations.overview: ピッツバーグの病院の最前線で働く医師たちを通して、現在のアメリカの医療が直面している問題を浮き彫りにする。主人公のロビナヴィッチ医師は経営効率化を図る経営陣や病院内政治と戦いながら研修医を育て、次々に送られてくる患者に対応し奮闘する。
Pittsburgh Pennsylvania'daki bir hastanede çalışan sağlık profesyonellerinin, kritik hastaları tedavi etmenin duygusal yüküyle boğuşurken günlük ve hastanedeki yaşamları.

translations.title: چاله
translations.overview: کادر پزشکی و درمانی بیمارستان پیتسبورگ با بحران های شخصی، مسائل کاری و فشار روانی رسیدگی به بیماران بحرانی دست و پنجه نرم می کنند.

translations.title: Bệnh Viện Pitt
translations.overview: Một bệnh viện trong giai đoạn khó khăn, các y bác sĩ vừa phải căng mình nỗ lực cứu lấy người bệnh, vừa phải đối phó với những vấn đề cá nhân nan giải.

translations.title: مستشفى بيتسبرغ
translations.overview: الحياة اليومية لمقدمي الرعاية الصحية في مستشفى بيتسبرغ في بنسلفانيا صراع، فهم يحاولون التوفيق بين الأزمات الشخصية وسياسات مكان العمل وتكلفة علاج المرضى المصابين بأمراض خطيرة، مما يكشف عن المرونة المطلوبة في دعوتهم النبيلة.

translations.title: 匹茲堡
translations.overview: 本劇透過賓夕法尼亞州匹茲堡現代醫院中第一線英雄的視角，檢視當今美國醫療工作者所面臨的挑戰。

translations.title: Le Pitt
translations.overview: Le Pitt offre un regard sans concession sur le quotidien intense et chaotique d'un hôpital de traumatologie de Pittsburgh. La série suit des professionnels de la santé sous-financés et souvent en sous-effectif, alors qu'ils jonglent avec des urgences médicales critiques, des drames personnels et les exigences émotionnelles de leur métier.
Lo staff del Trauma Medical Center di Pittsburgh lavora ininterrottamente per salvare vite in un reparto di emergenza sovraffollato e senza fondi.
Das Personal des Trauma Medical Centers Pittsburgh arbeitet rund um die Uhr, um in einer übervollen und unterfinanzierten Notaufnahme Leben zu retten.
Το προσωπικό του Κέντρου Τραυματολογίας του Πίτσμπεργκ εργάζεται όλο το εικοσιτετράωρο για να σώσει ζωές σε ένα υπερφορτωμένο και υποχρηματοδοτούμενο τμήμα επειγόντων περιστατικών.

translations.title: הפיט
translations.overview: הצוות במרכז הרפואי פיטסבורג עובד מסביב לשעון כדי להציל אנשים בחדר מיון צפוף וחסר מימון.

episodes.title: 7:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: While attempting to distract himself from the anniversary of his mentor's death, Dr. Robby introduces a fresh batch of interns to life in the ER.

episodes.title: 8:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: Robby helps siblings navigate their elderly father's end of life care. Later, Samira fends off cops targeting a woman with a misunderstood condition.

episodes.title: 9:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: Samira does her best to keep Whitaker on the right track. A teen overdose sparks conflict in the ER.

episodes.title: 10:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: Bets are taken on the whereabouts of a stolen ambulance, while Santos learns a hard lesson, and Whitaker helps to tame “The Kraken.”

episodes.title: 11:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: Santos and Collins each deal with moral quandaries. Samira’s careful approach earns praise from patients – and reproach from Robby.

episodes.title: 12:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: While Robby handles an ultimatum from the hospital, Mel, Javadi, and Collins each handle unique mother-daughter dynamics.

episodes.title: 1:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: After examining an influencer with strange symptoms, Samira pushes back against Robby. Santos contends with a patient accused of assault.

episodes.title: 2:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: While Robby attends to an elderly patient with ties to Pittsburgh's history, other members of the team attempt to resuscitate a young drowning victim.

episodes.title: 3:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: After a staff debrief from Robby, Dana defuses a waiting room brawl, Whitaker finds common ground with "The Kraken," and McKay faces a crucial error.

episodes.title: 4:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: With the Pitt down a staff member, Robby relies on his team to pick up the slack. Later, Santos finally voices her suspicions.

episodes.title: 5:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: While Robby tries to keep a developing staffing situation under wraps, Collins guides a surrogate through a difficult delivery.

episodes.title: 6:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: When dozens of critical patients flood the ER, Robby and his team struggle to keep up amid quickly diminished supplies.

episodes.title: 7:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: As the night shift begins, Robby refuses to give up on a mass casualty victim. Samira and Santos each attempt risky moves.

episodes.title: 8:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: While Robby struggles with a loss, Abbott coaches Samira through a risky procedure, and Mel treats a teen with a mysterious rash.

episodes.title: 9:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: Robby resorts to unorthodox methods to convince a father to allow treatment for his son. Later, Whitaker tracks down a missing patient.

episodes.title: 7:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: On July 4th, Robby meets his replacement for his upcoming sabbatical, and a familiar face returns to the Pitt.

episodes.title: 8:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: While nervously awaiting her deposition, King takes a tumble. Al-Hashimi tries to introduce new technology into the ER.

episodes.title: 9:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: After a motorcycle collision, a husband and wife find themselves in the ER. Later, Robby bonds with a Tree of Life survivor.

episodes.title: 10:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: With a nearby hospital shuttered on the busiest day of the year, Robby and team must field extra patients, including the victim of a parkour mishap.

episodes.title: 11:00 A.M.
episodes.overview: As patients continue to pour in, including a local prison inmate, Robby and Langdon must work together to save a beloved patient.

episodes.title: 12:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: As the team deals with a loss, Al-Hashimi and Robby continue to clash over the best course of treatment for a patient showing signs of malnutrition.

episodes.title: 1:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: While Dana tends to a sexual assault victim, Abbot helps an officer injured in the field, and Mohan attempts to keep her uninsured patient in the ER.

episodes.title: 2:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: In the wake of an IT shutdown, Princess must manage a completely analog ER. Al-Hashimi, Mohan, and King assess a woman with sudden blindness.

episodes.title: 3:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: After one of Javadi's patients slips through the cracks, Dana calls in an old friend with experience running a low-tech ER.

episodes.title: 4:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: After an incident at a nearby water park, several critical patients are rushed to the Pitt. Later, Al-Hashimi confronts Robby.

episodes.title: 5:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: While King struggles to cope with her sister's newfound independence, patients and staff are put on edge by an unexpected presence in the ER.

episodes.title: 6:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: After she steps up to defend her trainee, Dana clashes with Robby about her methods – and his upcoming sabbatical.

episodes.title: 7:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: As the night shift begins, Mohan's AMA patient is brought back to the ER, Langdon doubts his place in the Pitt, and Robby gets Duke's results.

episodes.title: 8:00 P.M.
episodes.overview: After his bike takes a hit in the ambulance bay, Robby levels with Duke. A spinal cord injury forces Langdon to attempt a risky procedure.
